module.name: require-node-protocol
module.description: Require Node.js built-in module imports to use the node: protocol prefix.

scenarios.name: should allow import already using node: prefix
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration

scenarios.name: should allow non-builtin module import
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration

scenarios.name: should allow relative import
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration

scenarios.name: should report bare builtin import and autofix with node: prefix
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration
scenarios.then: a requireNodeProtocol violation is reported and the fix rewrites the source to 'node:fs'

scenarios.name: should report bare builtin subpath import
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration
scenarios.then: a requireNodeProtocol violation is reported and the fix rewrites the source to 'node:fs/promises'

scenarios.name: should report type-only import of builtin without prefix
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration
scenarios.then: a requireNodeProtocol violation is reported and the fix adds the node: prefix

scenarios.name: should report named re-export from bare builtin
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the export declaration
scenarios.then: a requireNodeProtocol violation is reported and the fix rewrites the source to 'node:path'

scenarios.name: should report wildcard re-export from bare builtin
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the export declaration
scenarios.then: a requireNodeProtocol violation is reported and the fix rewrites the source to 'node:events'
